item.title: A GAME OF THRONES Movie is Coming
item.description: A "DUNE-sized" GAME OF THRONES feature film is in the works, book sales are on the rise despite economic hardship, we all love smut, and more.

item.title: Beyoncé and Reese Witherspoon Among This Year’s Audie Award Winners
item.description: The 31st Annual Audie Awards were held this week. The ceremony honored excellence in audiobooks and spoken-word narration.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for March 4, 2026
item.description: A workplace rom-com in the world of high school basketball, the last trial of Harper Lee, modern-day witches waging war on the patriarchy, and more of...

item.title: March’s New Comics and Graphic Novels Will Put a Spring in Your Step
item.description: Look through these new releases and find lots of stories about women and girls taking their future into their own hands — perfect for Women's History ...

item.title: 8 of the Best New Nonfiction Books of March 2026
item.description: This month is full of heavy hitters, including everything from hefty biographies to quiet ruminations on the small beauties in life.
